7.error: numbered name should be 'Turn 8' not 'Turn 7' — the Corkscrew is officially T8/8a; the real Turn 7 (a left kink at the top of the hill before the Corkscrew, around marker ~0.65) is missing from the dataset. The Corkscrew itself is a left-right combination; direction given is for the first (entry) apex.

8.error: numbered name 'Turn 8' conflicts with colloquial 'Turn 9' — this corner is officially Turn 9 (Rainey Curve); internal numbering is off by one from the Corkscrew onward due to the missing Turn 7

9.error: numbered name should be 'Turn 10' not 'Turn 9' — off-by-one from missing Turn 7

10.error: numbered name should be 'Turn 11' not 'Turn 10' — off-by-one from missing Turn 7

gp.errors_summary: Laguna Seca officially has 11 turns but only 10 are listed: the Turn 7 left kink before the Corkscrew is missing, causing the numbered names from the Corkscrew (officially T8/8a) onward to be off by one versus the correct colloquial labels already present
